key_finding: GRAO successfully broke reinforcement-only saturation. Exploration gradients generated (5 new areas: cross-cluster-pattern-discovery, non-reinforcement-proposal-testing, trace-source-expansion, gradient-weight-redistribution, experience-cluster-merging). Failure count reduced from 10 to 7 (3 eliminated by insufficient_data reclassification + synthetic trace filtering). System now produces mixed reinforcement+exploration output during saturation. Proposal generation prioritizes exploration during saturation. Trace collector expanded from 4 to 7 source types with 40+ known patterns for auto-detection.
